subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest that one of Thy handmaidens hath presented herself before the throne, seeking Thy grace and benevolence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری قد حضرت لدی العرش امه من امائک و ارادت فضلک و احسانک ای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
